Investigate the claim regarding the mass gap threshold 'beta < 1/6' in lattice Yang-Mills theory. Specifically: 1. Verify if 'beta < 1/6' is a recognized threshold or a misconception/error in the field. 3. Identify the meaning of the 'irreparable gap' in this specific context. 4. Determine the correct threshold or the valid mathematical route required to address the mass gap problem in lattice gauge theory.
